'''Rrulinn''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Yushan sector/Legends|Yushan sector]]. Its population fell victim to the [[Reslian Purge]], much as did the [[Tunroth]].
